rich.title: [Remote] Top 20 CEX is looking for English Customer Support   1000-2000 USDT
rich.author: AriaF9
rich.summary:
## About
Join Our Global Customer Support Team (Remote)
We are looking for passionate and experienced community/customer support talents to join our growing global team in the Web3 & Crypto industry.
responsibilities: Provide customer support in English through live chat, ticketing systems, Telegram, Discord, and other communication channels;
Handle user inquiries related to accounts, deposits, withdrawals, trading, KYC verification, and general platform usage;
Troubleshoot user issues, collect feedback, and escalate urgent or technical matters to internal teams when necessary;
Deliver a professional, friendly, and efficient customer service experience to enhance user satisfaction;
Support the communication and localization of official announcements, campaigns, and platform updates;
Monitor community sentiment and help maintain an active and positive user environment;
Participate in rotating shifts to support 24/7 customer service operations.

sections.title: About
paragraphs: Join Our Global Customer Support Team (Remote)
We are looking for passionate and experienced community/customer support talents to join our growing global team in the Web3 & Crypto industry.

sections.title: Responsibilities
bullets: Provide customer support in English through live chat, ticketing systems, Telegram, Discord, and other communication channels;
Handle user inquiries related to accounts, deposits, withdrawals, trading, KYC verification, and general platform usage;
Troubleshoot user issues, collect feedback, and escalate urgent or technical matters to internal teams when necessary;
Deliver a professional, friendly, and efficient customer service experience to enhance user satisfaction;
Support the communication and localization of official announcements, campaigns, and platform updates;
Monitor community sentiment and help maintain an active and positive user environment;
Participate in rotating shifts to support 24/7 customer service operations.

sections.title: Requirements
bullets: At least 1 year of experience in online customer support, preferably in cryptocurrency exchanges, fintech, or Web3-related industries;
Basic understanding of cryptocurrency, blockchain, and exchange products;
Excellent communication skills with a strong sense of responsibility and customer service awareness;
Able to work independently in a remote environment and adapt to shift schedules;
Familiarity with Telegram, Discord, Zendesk, or similar customer support tools is preferred.

narrative: ## About Join Our Global Customer Support Team (Remote) We are looking for passionate and experienced community/customer support talents to join our growing global team in the Web3 & Crypto industry.

- Provide customer support in English through live chat, ticketing systems, Telegram, Discord, and other communication channels; - Handle user inquiries related to accounts, deposits, withdrawals, trading, KYC verification, and general platform usage; - Troubleshoot user issues, collect feedback, and escalate urgent or technical matters to internal teams when necessary; - Deliver a professional, friendly, and efficient customer service experience to enhance user satisfaction; - Support the communication and localization of official announcements, campaigns, and platform updates; - Monitor community sentiment and help maintain an active and positive user environment; - Participate in rotating shifts to support 24/7 customer service operations.

- Native or fluent English speaker; - At least 1 year of experience in online customer support, preferably in cryptocurrency exchanges, fintech, or Web3-related industries; - Basic understanding of cryptocurrency, blockchain, and exchange products; - Excellent communication skills with a strong sense of responsibility and customer service awareness; - Able to work independently in a remote environment and adapt to shift schedules; - Familiarity with Telegram, Discord, Zendesk, or similar customer support tools is preferred.
## Nice to Haves Know about Future Tradings ## Job Nature
- Full-time or not: Full-time - Remote or not: Remote
## Salary and Benefits 1000-2000 USDT / Month Basic
## Work Location Remote ## Contact TG: @AriaWanax VX: Aurora_Wanax
